requestBody: {"TABLE":"application_map","DATABASE":"flow_metrics","DATA_SOURCE":"1m","QUERIES":[{"QUERY_ID":"R1-R1","ROLES":["R","R"],"SELECT":"newTag('R1-R1') as query_id, PerSecond(Avg(`request`)) AS `请求速率`, Avg(`server_error_ratio`) AS `服务端异常比例`, Avg(`rrt`) AS `响应时延`, node_type(auto_service_0) AS `client_node_type`, icon_id(auto_service_0) AS `client_icon_id`, auto_service_id_0, auto_service_0, is_internet_0, node_type(auto_service_1) AS `server_node_type`, icon_id(auto_service_1) AS `server_icon_id`, auto_service_id_1, auto_service_1, is_internet_1","TAGS":["node_type(auto_service_0) AS `client_node_type`","icon_id(auto_service_0) AS `client_icon_id`","auto_service_id_0","auto_service_0","is_internet_0","node_type(auto_service_1) AS `server_node_type`","icon_id(auto_service_1) AS `server_icon_id`","auto_service_id_1","auto_service_1","is_internet_1"],"CTAGS":["node_type(auto_service_0) AS `client_node_type`","icon_id(auto_service_0) AS `client_icon_id`","auto_service_id_0","auto_service_0","is_internet_0"],"STAGS":["node_type(auto_service_1) AS `server_node_type`","icon_id(auto_service_1) AS `server_icon_id`","auto_service_id_1","auto_service_1","is_internet_1"],"METRICS":["PerSecond(Avg(`request`)) AS `请求速率`","Avg(`server_error_ratio`) AS `服务端异常比例`","Avg(`rrt`) AS `响应时延`"],"GROUP_BY":"auto_service_0, is_internet_0, auto_service_id_0, `client_node_type`, auto_service_1, is_internet_1, auto_service_id_1, `server_node_type`"}],"PAGE_INDEX":1,"PAGE_SIZE":100,"SORT":{"ORDER_BY":"请求速率","SORTED_BY":"DESC"},"time_start":1784626740,"time_end":1784627640,"IS_RETURN_APPLICATION_TYPE":true,"TOTAL":true}
